title: MISCELLANEOUS TAXES
doc_html:
CHAPTER 3.  MISCELLANEOUS TAXES

PART I.  FOREIGN CORPORATIONS CAPITAL

STOCK TAX (REPEALED)

§2611.  §§2611 to 2616 Repealed by Acts 1968, No. 105, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 1969.
